penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional video showing different FLS tasks rather than a performance attempt to be scored.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude identified this as instructional content showing multiple FLS tasks rather than a single peg transfer performance. GPT-4o attempted to score it as a performance with timing and penalties. Given the fundamental disagreement about video content type, Claude's assessment that this is educational material rather than a scoreable performance attempt is more conservative and appropriate.

disagreements.rationale: If this is instructional content as Claude identified, no completion time should be recorded for a performance attempt.

claude_value.description: This appears to be an instructional video showing different FLS tasks rather than a performance attempt to be scored.

gpt_value.description: One object dropped outside the field of view and was unretrievable.

disagreements.rationale: The fundamental question is whether this video contains a scoreable performance attempt. Claude's identification of instructional content is more conservative and appropriate.
If no actual performance attempt occurred, no performance phases should be detected.
Instructional content cannot receive a performance score. The incomplete_task condition results in automatic zero.
